overTheCounterOTCTradingIsAPrivateAndFle: Over-the-counter (OTC) trading is a private and flexible method for buying or selling cryptocurrencies
unlikeTraditionalExchangesWhereTransacti: Unlike traditional exchanges, where transactions are visible and influenced by market fluctuations, OTC trading provides a discreet, direct channel between buyers and sellers.

onRampRefersToUsingFiatCurrenciesToBuyCr: On ramp refers to using fiat currencies (e.g., USD, EUR) to buy cryptocurrencies or digital assets (e.g., USDT, BTC)
offRampRefersToSellingCryptocurrenciesOr: Off ramp refers to selling cryptocurrencies or digital assets (e.g., USDT, BTC) to fiat currencies (e.g., USD, EUR)

allTradesMustBePreFundedInCryptoOffRampO: All trades must be pre-funded in crypto (off-ramp) or fiat (on-ramp). YASBe does not offer credit lines or margin trading.
yasBeDoNotHoldCustodyOfAnyCryptocurrency: YASBe do not hold custody of any cryptocurrency or digital assets on behalf of trading counterparties.
